text:
EVANGELION:30+； 30th ANNIVERSARY OF EVANGELION is an event that was held in Yokohama Arena from 21 February 2026 to 23 February 2026.

Overview

The EVANGELION series celebrated its 30th anniversary in 2025 since the TV broadcast of Neon Genesis Evangelion in 1995. This event was a chance to enjoy the EVANGELION series from various angles as a culmination of the anniversary planning that continued from 2025.

A variety of content were planned, including exhibits, stage events, and merchandise sales. This was an anniversary festival where people could celebrate the 30th anniversary together with all the fans who support EVANGELION!

It also includes an exclusive 13-minute long short video. A second edition is being held in April. Reddit post
